title: poterium sanguisorba var. glaucescens
intro: Poterium sanguisorba var. glaucescens, commonly known as the blue fringed sanguisorba, is a perennial plant species in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to Europe and Western Asia. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and astringent properties. The health benefits of blue fringed sanguisorba include its ability to treat wounds, reduce inflammation, and soothe digestive issues. Blue fringed sanguisorba can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or salve, making it a versatile remedy for various health concerns.
